screen.extra_items.technical_book.left_p: Euler's formula links exponential and trigonometric functions.
screen.extra_items.technical_book.right_: Substituting x = π simplifies the expression to e^(iπ) = -1.
screen.extra_items.technical_book.footno: It is widely known as a beautiful identity.
